compiled_state.title: Test gate error message: 'Re-run record-test-status.sh' missing full path and --source-file flag
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: The pre-commit test gate outputs 'Re-run record-test-status.sh or use /dso:commit to re-record test status' when the diff hash changed. But the script is at plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh (not scripts/) and requires --source-file flag. Agents seeing this message run 'bash plugins/dso/scripts/record-test-status.sh ...' (wrong path) and get a 127 error before finding the correct path. Suggestion: include the full invocation in the error message: 'bash plugins/dso/hooks/record-test-status.sh --source-file <changed-source-file>'.

comments.body: Investigation complete. Proposed fix was reviewed and DENIED: the error message for check-plugin-self-ref.sh cannot include hardcoded 'plugins/dso' paths because this hook is distributed with the plugin and must be generic to any project install location. The fix would embed a project-specific path in a distributed file, violating plugin genericity. No code fix possible without changing the design. Leaving open for further design consideration — possible approach: use a variable placeholder like ${PLUGIN_DIR} in the error message instead of a hardcoded path.
comments.author: Test
